title: skopeo not working with Google Artifact Registry & the gcloud creds helper?
body:
Hoping I'm not missing anything.

```
+ /nix/store/hxczn15kq3sql7ln18f6nh9vx605l52a-google-cloud-sdk-515.0.0/bin/gcloud auth configure-docker europe-west9-docker.pkg.dev --quiet
WARNING: Your config file at [/Users/pcarrier/.docker/config.json] contains these credential helper entries:

{
  "credHelpers": {
    "us-central1-docker.pkg.dev": "gcloud",
    "europe-west9-docker.pkg.dev": "gcloud"
  }
}
Adding credentials for: europe-west9-docker.pkg.dev
gcloud credential helpers already registered correctly.
+ /nix/store/a21lk75fpp6n42vkzj7cn0z370y4vj4p-skopeo-1.18.0/bin/skopeo inspect docker://europe-west9-docker.pkg.dev/twin-multiverse-sandbox/twin-multiverse-sandbox-paris:0926250
+ exec /nix/store/a21lk75fpp6n42vkzj7cn0z370y4vj4p-skopeo-1.18.0/bin/skopeo --insecure-policy copy docker-archive:/nix/store/qh3zf0pjnhh86l2sy11nmar59cjswx14-docker-image-trampoline.tar.gz docker://europe-west9-docker.pkg.dev/twin-multiverse-sandbox/twin-multiverse-sandbox-paris:0926250
Getting image source signatures
FATA[0002] trying to reuse blob sha256:e59f03e7b5b701e292446e3608d2d734fa52390c7a5564a4b0b342f5ba6533c8 at destination: Requesting bearer token: invalid status code from registry 400 (Bad Request) 
```

Best I can tell I'm an admin on the account and successfully logged in.

How can I troubleshoot further / fix this?

comments.body: Forgot the image name. Oh well, do I look silly.
